zh.lifeSummary: Robert Wilson是Robert Wilson的兒子，於大約1526年出生在英國越可爾米費爾德。他於1543年11月20日與Joane Ellis在英國越可爾希 梅爾敦結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1568年6月24日在英國英格蘭越可爾代福斯波利享年43歲，埋葬在英國越可爾米費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert Wilson是Robert Wilson的儿子，于大约1526年出生在英国越可爾米費爾德。他于1543年11月20日与Joane Ellis在英国越可爾希 梅爾敦结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1568年6月24日在英国英格兰越可爾代福斯波利享年43岁，埋葬在英国越可爾米費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Wilson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will + patronymic -son ‘son of Will’. Will was a very common medieval short form of William . This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Will
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will, a short form of William . This surname is now commonly found in Scotland, in Aberdeenshire, Angus, and Kincardineshire.

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or stream, from Middle English wel, wel(l)e, wille, in a southwestern dialect form. This surname is found predominantly in the south and southwestern parts of the country. Compare Well 1.
English: nickname from Middle English iwil, wil(l)e ‘agreeable, pleasing’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Robert Wilson was born about 1526, in Mirfield, Yorkshire, England as the son of Robert Wilson. He married Joane Ellis on 20 November 1543, in High Melton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 24 June 1568, in Dewsbury, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43, and was buried in Mirfield, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert Wilson est né environ 1526, à Mirfield, Everwyck, Angleterre, fils de Robert Wilson. Il a épousé Joane Ellis le 20 novembre 1543, à High Melton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 24 juin 1568, à Dewsbury, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Mirfield, Everwyck, Angleterre.

Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 24. Juni 1568 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Dewsbury, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Mirfield, Yorkshire, England begraben.

Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 24 giugno 1568, nel Dewsbury, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Mirfield, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Wilsonは約1526年にイギリスヨークシュアイアミルフィールドでRobert Wilsonの息子として生まれた。1543年11月20日にイギリスヨークシュアイアヒグ メルトンでJoane Ellisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1568年6月24日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアデウスブリーで43歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアミルフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Wilson(은)는 대략 1526년 영국 요르크실르 미르필드에서 Robert Wilson의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1543년 11월 20일 영국 요르크실르 히그h 멜턴에서 Joane Ellis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1568년 6월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 데w스버이에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 미르필드에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Joane Ellis em 20 de novembro de 1543, em High Melton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Robert Wilson родился около 1526 г. в местности мирфиелд, еркшир, Англия. Его отца звали Robert Wilson. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Ellis 20 ноября 1543 г. в местности хаи мелтон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 24 июня 1568 г. в местности дюсбури, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности мирфиелд, еркшир, Англия.
